pages.raw_text:
An effort will be made in the spring
to boom the upper st. Joe river dis
trict as a mining section, according to
Mike Dowd, the mining man, who has
quite extensive interests there. Al
party of 20 is already organized to
make the trip and locate claims and
otherwise develop what is partially
unexplored wilderness.


Mr.. Dowd has made several trips
into the section and located several
claims and believes the district will
eventually become great mining
center. Its close proximity to the FAM
Gus Occur d'Alene district is a point
in it's favor, and the rivers and creekt
are said to be loaded with placer gold,


The intention of this party is ID
make as many locations as possible,
then send representatives to the east
and raise money for development.
